PublicRemarks: Rarely available in the highly coveted community of Liseter, this exceptional executive rental offers an elegant blend of luxury, comfort, and carefree living. This stunning end-unit twin carriage home features 3–4 bedrooms, 4 full baths, and 1 half bath, with beautifully appointed living spaces designed for both everyday enjoyment and entertaining. Step into the dramatic two-story foyer, where a curved staircase and rich hardwood flooring set the tone for the home’s refined interiors. Flanking the foyer are a formal dining room adorned with designer wallpaper and chair rail detailing, and a spacious private office, along with a mudroom and stylish powder room. At the heart of the home is the expansive open-concept kitchen, thoughtfully designed with a large granite island, JennAir stainless steel appliances, commercial-grade built-in refrigerator, and sunny breakfast area. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the inviting family room, centered around a cozy gas fireplace—perfect for relaxing evenings or hosting guests. Upstairs, the second level offers three generously sized bedrooms, each with access to a full bathroom, as well as a convenient laundry room with built-in cabinetry. The luxurious primary suite is a true retreat, featuring a spacious bedroom, walk-in closet, and spa-inspired bath complete with grasscloth wallpaper, double vanity, freestanding soaking tub, and oversized frameless glass shower with bench seating. The finished lower level provides additional living space, including a large recreation room with bar area, a beautifully finished full bath with stall shower, and an additional room ideal as a guest bedroom, gym, or flex space. Outdoor living is equally inviting, with a charming front porch perfect for morning coffee and a private rear deck with pergola for al fresco dining and entertaining. Residents of Liseter enjoy a truly maintenance-free lifestyle, with HOA-covered landscaping and snow removal, along with resort-style amenities including an infinity pool, tennis and pickleball courts, basketball court, clubhouse with fitness center and yoga studio, party barn, and scenic walking trails. PublicRemarks: Welcome to 17 Wharton Dr in desirable Greenbriar II.  The Monroe model (largest in community) is loaded with upgrades and has an amazing floor plan that offers 3 bedrooms 2 1/2 baths and a 2 CAR GARAGE!  It boasts an open layout and includes:   1st floor hardwood floors, a fabulous gourmet kitchen eat in with granite counter tops, stainless appliances, and double oven, a dramatic two story FR with gas fireplace, formal LR & DR's with crown molding, chair rail, custom window blinds and wainscoting. The 2nd floor is highlighted by a spacious MBR suite with dual closets, lighted ceiling fan, and spacious bath with garden tub; 2 additional generously sized bedrooms, full hall bath & laundry room complete this level. The lower level is professionally finished and provides additional living space for office or recreational space. Other great features include a maintenance free deck with wooded views and large open space, charming front porch, and usable rear yard space. Located in beautiful Thornbury Township: minutes from downtown West Chester & fabulous shopping; enjoy nearby parks & trails including the Squire Cheyney  Farm Park & West Chester Area Schools.

PublicRemarks: Nestled in the picturesque town of St. Davids, Pennsylvania, Radnor Crossing offers an unparalleled living experience for those seeking a perfect blend of suburban tranquility and urban convenience. This exceptional apartment community, located at 284 Iven Avenue, is situated just south of Wayne, PA, making it an ideal choice for residents who desire a cosmopolitan lifestyle within a highly-rated school district. Radnor Crossing boasts a variety of thoughtfully designed one and two-bedroom apartments, each crafted to meet the needs of modern living. The newly remodeled kitchens and bathrooms showcase elegant finishes, including Parkstone White Shaker soft-close cabinets, Carrara Marmi quartz countertops, and snowy white ceramic subway tile backsplashes in select units. Energy-efficient Frigidaire stainless-steel appliances complement the sleek design, while Almond Oak Endura Plus plank flooring adds a touch of warmth and sophistication. Residents of Radnor Crossing will find themselves immersed in a community that prioritizes comfort and convenience. The resort-style outdoor pool provides a refreshing escape during warm summer months, while the state-of-the-art fitness center, complete with the innovative ScullyFit virtual active cardio experience, caters to health enthusiasts year-round. For those who prefer outdoor activities, the nearby Radnor Trail offers endless opportunities for walking, jogging, or cycling. The prime location of Radnor Crossing is one of its most appealing features. Situated in close proximity to several prestigious educational institutions, including Villanova University, Rosemont College, Haverford College, and Bryn Mawr College, it's an ideal home for students and faculty alike. The community's location also provides easy access to public transportation, with a short walk to the train station, making commutes to Philadelphia or other nearby cities a breeze. Future residents will fall in love with the vibrant local scene surrounding Radnor Crossing. The area boasts an array of dining options, from the cozy ambiance of White Dog Cafe to the authentic Italian flavors of Pietro's Pizza. For those who enjoy a night out, the community's proximity to various entertainment venues ensures there's always something exciting to do. The management team at Radnor Crossing is known for their excellence, responsiveness, and friendly demeanor, ensuring that residents' needs are always met with prompt and professional service. The beautifully landscaped grounds, featuring rolling hills, create a serene atmosphere that residents can enjoy from their private balconies or patios. Pet lovers will appreciate the pet-friendly policy at Radnor Crossing, allowing them to share their home with their furry companions. The community welcomes both cats and dogs, subject to certain restrictions and fees. Living at Radnor Crossing means embracing a lifestyle of comfort, convenience, and community. Whether you're a young professional, a student, or someone looking for a peaceful yet well-connected home, Radnor Crossing offers an exceptional living experience. With its prime location, top-notch amenities, and beautifully designed apartments, residents will find themselves part of a thriving community that truly feels like home in the heart of Delaware County, Pennsylvania. * Pricing and availability subject to change on a daily basis ** Photos are of model units ** Parking may be available for additional fee **

PublicRemarks: Welcome to Unit 1F at 2723–2725 W 3rd St in Chester, PA. This well-laid-out 4-bedroom, 1.5 bathroom apartment offers comfortable living at an affordable price. The unit features a bright living area, generously sized bedrooms with good closet space, and a functional kitchen with ample cabinetry. The bathroom is clean and well-maintained, and the overall layout provides a nice separation between living and sleeping areas. Conveniently located near local shopping, public transportation, and major roadways, this apartment is ideal for commuters and anyone looking for easy access to everyday essentials. Don’t miss this opportunity—schedule your showing today.

Welcome to 412 Yorkshire Road—an exceptional rental opportunity in the highly sought-after Beaupre neighborhood of Bryn Mawr, located within the award-winning Radnor Township School District. Set on nearly an acre of flat, usable land, this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home offers an outstanding blend of space, comfort, and everyday luxury. The home features a classic split-level layout filled with natural light and an inviting, open feel. A sun-drenched living room with a large picture window flows seamlessly into the dining area, both highlighted by rich hardwood floors. The updated eat-in kitchen is a true standout—featuring granite countertops, crisp white cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a clean, modern aesthetic—perfect for both daily living and entertaining. Just steps below, the spacious family room is anchored by a charming wood-burning fireplace and opens directly to the backyard through sliding glass doors, creating an effortless indoor-outdoor lifestyle. A well-designed mudroom/laundry area, powder room, and access to the attached two-car garage add to the home’s functionality. Upstairs, the primary suite offers a walk-in closet and a tastefully updated en-suite bath. Three additional bedrooms share a beautifully refreshed hall bath, complete with a soaking/jacuzzi tub—ideal for relaxing at the end of the day. The finished lower level provides versatile space for a home office, gym, playroom, or additional storage. Recent upgrades—including a newer roof, new HVAC system, and fresh paint throughout—mean you can move in with complete peace of mind. PublicRemarks: Nestled in the picturesque town of St. Davids, Pennsylvania, Radnor Crossing offers an unparalleled living experience for those seeking a perfect blend of suburban tranquility and urban convenience. This exceptional apartment community, located at 284 Iven Avenue, is situated just south of Wayne, PA, making it an ideal choice for residents who desire a cosmopolitan lifestyle within a highly-rated school district. Radnor Crossing boasts a variety of thoughtfully designed one and two-bedroom apartments, each crafted to meet the needs of modern living. The newly remodeled kitchens and bathrooms showcase elegant finishes, including Parkstone White Shaker soft-close cabinets, Carrara Marmi quartz countertops, and snowy white ceramic subway tile backsplashes in select units. Energy-efficient Frigidaire stainless-steel appliances complement the sleek design, while Almond Oak Endura Plus plank flooring adds a touch of warmth and sophistication. Residents of Radnor Crossing will find themselves immersed in a community that prioritizes comfort and convenience. The resort-style outdoor pool provides a refreshing escape during warm summer months, while the state-of-the-art fitness center, complete with the innovative ScullyFit virtual active cardio experience, caters to health enthusiasts year-round. For those who prefer outdoor activities, the nearby Radnor Trail offers endless opportunities for walking, jogging, or cycling. The prime location of Radnor Crossing is one of its most appealing features. Situated in close proximity to several prestigious educational institutions, including Villanova University, Rosemont College, Haverford College, and Bryn Mawr College, it's an ideal home for students and faculty alike. The community's location also provides easy access to public transportation, with a short walk to the train station, making commutes to Philadelphia or other nearby cities a breeze. Future residents will fall in love with the vibrant local scene surrounding Radnor Crossing. The area boasts an array of dining options, from the cozy ambiance of White Dog Cafe to the authentic Italian flavors of Pietro's Pizza. For those who enjoy a night out, the community's proximity to various entertainment venues ensures there's always something exciting to do. The management team at Radnor Crossing is known for their excellence, responsiveness, and friendly demeanor, ensuring that residents' needs are always met with prompt and professional service. The beautifully landscaped grounds, featuring rolling hills, create a serene atmosphere that residents can enjoy from their private balconies or patios. Pet lovers will appreciate the pet-friendly policy at Radnor Crossing, allowing them to share their home with their furry companions. The community welcomes both cats and dogs, subject to certain restrictions and fees. Living at Radnor Crossing means embracing a lifestyle of comfort, convenience, and community. Whether you're a young professional, a student, or someone looking for a peaceful yet well-connected home, Radnor Crossing offers an exceptional living experience. With its prime location, top-notch amenities, and beautifully designed apartments, residents will find themselves part of a thriving community that truly feels like home in the heart of Delaware County, Pennsylvania. * Pricing and availability subject to change on a daily basis ** Photos are of model units ** Parking may be available for additional fee **

PublicRemarks: Nestled in the picturesque town of St. Davids, Pennsylvania, Radnor Crossing offers an unparalleled living experience for those seeking a perfect blend of suburban tranquility and urban convenience. This exceptional apartment community, located at 284 Iven Avenue, is situated just south of Wayne, PA, making it an ideal choice for residents who desire a cosmopolitan lifestyle within a highly-rated school district. Radnor Crossing boasts a variety of thoughtfully designed one and two-bedroom apartments, each crafted to meet the needs of modern living. The newly remodeled kitchens and bathrooms showcase elegant finishes, including Parkstone White Shaker soft-close cabinets, Carrara Marmi quartz countertops, and snowy white ceramic subway tile backsplashes in select units. Energy-efficient Frigidaire stainless-steel appliances complement the sleek design, while Almond Oak Endura Plus plank flooring adds a touch of warmth and sophistication. Residents of Radnor Crossing will find themselves immersed in a community that prioritizes comfort and convenience. The resort-style outdoor pool provides a refreshing escape during warm summer months, while the state-of-the-art fitness center, complete with the innovative ScullyFit virtual active cardio experience, caters to health enthusiasts year-round. For those who prefer outdoor activities, the nearby Radnor Trail offers endless opportunities for walking, jogging, or cycling. The prime location of Radnor Crossing is one of its most appealing features. Situated in close proximity to several prestigious educational institutions, including Villanova University, Rosemont College, Haverford College, and Bryn Mawr College, it's an ideal home for students and faculty alike. The community's location also provides easy access to public transportation, with a short walk to the train station, making commutes to Philadelphia or other nearby cities a breeze. Future residents will fall in love with the vibrant local scene surrounding Radnor Crossing. The area boasts an array of dining options, from the cozy ambiance of White Dog Cafe to the authentic Italian flavors of Pietro's Pizza. For those who enjoy a night out, the community's proximity to various entertainment venues ensures there's always something exciting to do. The management team at Radnor Crossing is known for their excellence, responsiveness, and friendly demeanor, ensuring that residents' needs are always met with prompt and professional service. The beautifully landscaped grounds, featuring rolling hills, create a serene atmosphere that residents can enjoy from their private balconies or patios. Pet lovers will appreciate the pet-friendly policy at Radnor Crossing, allowing them to share their home with their furry companions. The community welcomes both cats and dogs, subject to certain restrictions and fees. Living at Radnor Crossing means embracing a lifestyle of comfort, convenience, and community. Whether you're a young professional, a student, or someone looking for a peaceful yet well-connected home, Radnor Crossing offers an exceptional living experience. With its prime location, top-notch amenities, and beautifully designed apartments, residents will find themselves part of a thriving community that truly feels like home in the heart of Delaware County, Pennsylvania. * Pricing and availability subject to change on a daily basis ** Photos are of model units ** Parking may be available for additional fee **

This exceptional apartment community, located at 284 Iven Avenue, is situated just south of Wayne, PA, making it an ideal choice for residents who desire a cosmopolitan lifestyle within a highly-rated school district. Radnor Crossing boasts a variety of thoughtfully designed one and two-bedroom apartments, each crafted to meet the needs of modern living. The newly remodeled kitchens and bathrooms showcase elegant finishes, including Parkstone White Shaker soft-close cabinets, Carrara Marmi quartz countertops, and snowy white ceramic subway tile backsplashes in select units. Energy-efficient Frigidaire stainless-steel appliances complement the sleek design, while Almond Oak Endura Plus plank flooring adds a touch of warmth and sophistication. Residents of Radnor Crossing will find themselves immersed in a community that prioritizes comfort and convenience. The resort-style outdoor pool provides a refreshing escape during warm summer months, while the state-of-the-art fitness center, complete with the innovative ScullyFit virtual active cardio experience, caters to health enthusiasts year-round. For those who prefer outdoor activities, the nearby Radnor Trail offers endless opportunities for walking, jogging, or cycling. The prime location of Radnor Crossing is one of its most appealing features. Situated in close proximity to several prestigious educational institutions, including Villanova University, Rosemont College, Haverford College, and Bryn Mawr College, it's an ideal home for students and faculty alike. The community's location also provides easy access to public transportation, with a short walk to the train station, making commutes to Philadelphia or other nearby cities a breeze. Future residents will fall in love with the vibrant local scene surrounding Radnor Crossing. The area boasts an array of dining options, from the cozy ambiance of White Dog Cafe to the authentic Italian flavors of Pietro's Pizza. For those who enjoy a night out, the community's proximity to various entertainment venues ensures there's always something exciting to do. The management team at Radnor Crossing is known for their excellence, responsiveness, and friendly demeanor, ensuring that residents' needs are always met with prompt and professional service. The beautifully landscaped grounds, featuring rolling hills, create a serene atmosphere that residents can enjoy from their private balconies or patios. Pet lovers will appreciate the pet-friendly policy at Radnor Crossing, allowing them to share their home with their furry companions. The community welcomes both cats and dogs, subject to certain restrictions and fees. Living at Radnor Crossing means embracing a lifestyle of comfort, convenience, and community. Whether you're a young professional, a student, or someone looking for a peaceful yet well-connected home, Radnor Crossing offers an exceptional living experience. With its prime location, top-notch amenities, and beautifully designed apartments, residents will find themselves part of a thriving community that truly feels like home in the heart of Delaware County, Pennsylvania. * Pricing and availability subject to change on a daily basis ** Photos are of model units ** Parking may be available for additional fee **

Welcome to this stunning & open Brad Bernstein designed Contemporary 5 bedroom 5.1 baths home located on a premium & secluded 2 acre lot with spectacular views in the heart of Chadds Ford. The entrance Foyer is stunning with gleaming refinished Hardwood Flooring running throughout the main level. The Great Room has a Floor-to-Ceiling Stone fireplace, vaulted ceilings & large sky windows allowing plenty of natural light & warmth to flow throughout. The Custom kitchen has oak cabinetry, state of the art stainless steel appliances & granite countertops. The Elegant dining room is well appointed and overlooks a large expanded deck with magnificent views of lush open space. Hardwood flooring continues upstairs and into the Master Suite. A large wall of windows allow for natural light and an impressive view to start your day. The Master Bedroom also includes Two Master Bath suites. The walkout Lower Level is open and large with imported tiles throughout. Located in the Unionville Chadds Ford School District. Make this one of kind private retreat your home.
